item.title: Wholesale Linen Blouse | Bohemian Printed Deep V-Neck Top
item.description: Breathable printed linen with a bohemian retro style. Deep V-neck and loose oversized fit for a relaxed, vacation-ready silhouette. Lightweight and comfortable for summer and resort wear.
